stories.title: Cinderella
stories.description: A kind girl mistreated by her stepfamily attends a royal ball with magical help, loses her glass slipper, and is found by the prince who marries her.

stories.title: Little Red Riding Hood
stories.description: A young girl on her way to Grandma's house is tricked by a wolf who eats her grandmother, then tries to eat her too, until a woodsman cuts them free.

stories.title: Sleeping Beauty
stories.description: A princess cursed to prick her finger on a spindle and die instead falls into a deep sleep, awakened only by true love's kiss after a hundred years.

stories.title: Snow White
stories.description: A beautiful princess flees from her jealous stepmother the queen, lives with seven dwarfs, eats a poisoned apple, and is revived by a prince's kiss.

stories.title: The Tortoise and the Hare
stories.description: An overconfident fast rabbit loses a race to a slow, steady tortoise who never stops moving.

stories.title: The Boy Who Cried Wolf
stories.description: A shepherd boy repeatedly tricks villagers into thinking a wolf is attacking, so when a real wolf comes, nobody believes him and his flock is eaten.

stories.title: King Midas
stories.description: A greedy king wishes that everything he touches turns to gold, only to discover he can't eat or hug his daughter, and begs to reverse the curse.

stories.title: Theseus and the Minotaur
stories.description: A prince volunteers to enter a labyrinth and slays the half-man, half-bull monster, then finds his way out using a ball of thread.

stories.title: Pandora's Box
stories.description: The first woman opens a forbidden box, releasing all the evils of the world, but only Hope remains inside to comfort humanity.

stories.title: The Ugly Duckling
stories.description: An outcast duckling endures mockery for looking different, only to grow into a beautiful swan.

stories.title: Jack and the Beanstalk
stories.description: A boy trades a cow for magic beans that grow into a giant beanstalk; he climbs it, steals treasure from a giant, and chops the stalk down.

stories.title: Rapunzel
stories.description: A girl with impossibly long hair is locked in a tower; a prince climbs her hair to visit her until a witch cuts it and banishes them both, but they reunite.

stories.title: The Princess and the Pea
stories.description: A queen tests a so-called princess by placing a pea under twenty mattresses; the princess's sensitivity proves her royal blood.

stories.title: Hansel and Gretel
stories.description: Two children lost in a forest find a house made of candy owned by a witch who tries to eat them, but they push her into her own oven.

stories.title: The Three Little Pigs
stories.description: Three pigs build houses of straw, sticks, and bricks; a wolf blows down the first two but fails against the brick house.

stories.title: Goldilocks and the Three Bears
stories.description: A girl enters a bear family's home, eats their porridge, sits in their chairs, sleeps in a bed, and flees when the bears return.

stories.title: The Elves and the Shoemaker
stories.description: A poor shoemaker and his wife wake up to find beautiful shoes made overnight by secret elves, so they sew the elves tiny clothes as thanks.

stories.title: Puss in Boots
stories.description: A clever cat secures wealth and a castle for his poor master by tricking an ogre and a king through cunning disguises.

stories.title: Beauty and the Beast
stories.description: A young woman agrees to live with a monstrous beast to save her father, learns to love him, and breaks a spell that turns him into a handsome prince.

stories.title: Aladdin and the Wonderful Lamp
stories.description: A poor boy rubs a magic lamp containing a genie who grants wishes, helping him win a princess and defeat an evil sorcerer.

stories.title: The Twelve Dancing Princesses
stories.description: A soldier solves the mystery of why twelve princesses wake up with worn-out shoes each morning—they secretly go dancing all night.

stories.title: The Pied Piper of Hamelin
stories.description: A piper lures away a town's rats with magic music, and when not paid, he lures away the children as well.

stories.title: The Lion and the Mouse
stories.description: A mouse spares a lion who later frees the mouse from a trap; the mouse then gnaws through ropes to save the lion's life.

stories.title: The Goose that Laid the Golden Eggs
stories.description: A farmer kills his goose to get all the gold eggs inside at once, only to find nothing and lose the golden eggs forever.

stories.title: Mulan
stories.description: A young woman disguises herself as a man to take her aging father's place in the army, wins battles with her wits, and brings honor to her family.
